Schema.Comment: The schema version table stores the current version of the database schema. Implementations are expected to query this table on connecting to the database in order to ensure that the calling code is compatible with the tables in the database.
Schema.Statement:
CREATE TABLE schema_version ( version_lock INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, version_application_id TEXT NOT NULL, version_number INTEGER NOT NULL,
CONSTRAINT schema_version_check_lock_primary PRIMARY KEY (version_lock),
CONSTRAINT schema_version_check_lock_locked CHECK (version_lock = 1) ) STRICT

Schema.Comment: The identifier table stores the identifier for the file. The table is restricted to a single row.
Schema.Statement:
CREATE TABLE identifier ( id_lock INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, id_group TEXT NOT NULL, id_name TEXT NOT NULL, id_version_major INTEGER NOT NULL, id_version_minor INTEGER NOT NULL,
CONSTRAINT identifier_check_lock_primary PRIMARY KEY (id_lock),
CONSTRAINT identifier_check_lock_locked CHECK (id_lock = 1) ) STRICT

CREATE TABLE clips ( clip_id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, clip_name TEXT NOT NULL, clip_format TEXT NOT NULL, clip_sample_rate INTEGER NOT NULL, clip_sample_depth INTEGER NOT NULL, clip_channels INTEGER NOT NULL, clip_endianness TEXT NOT NULL, clip_hash_algorithm TEXT NOT NULL, clip_hash_value TEXT NOT NULL, clip_blob BLOB, clip_loop_range_lower INTEGER, clip_loop_range_upper INTEGER ) STRICT

CREATE TABLE key_assignments ( ka_id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, ka_value_start INTEGER NOT NULL, ka_value_center INTEGER NOT NULL, ka_value_end INTEGER NOT NULL, ka_clip_id INTEGER NOT NULL, ka_amplitude_at_key_start REAL NOT NULL, ka_amplitude_at_key_center REAL NOT NULL, ka_amplitude_at_key_end REAL NOT NULL, ka_at_velocity_start REAL NOT NULL, ka_at_velocity_center REAL NOT NULL, ka_at_velocity_end REAL NOT NULL, ka_amplitude_at_velocity_start REAL NOT NULL, ka_amplitude_at_velocity_center REAL NOT NULL, ka_amplitude_at_velocity_end REAL NOT NULL, ka_flags TEXT NOT NULL,
CONSTRAINT key_assignments_clip_exists FOREIGN KEY (ka_clip_id) REFERENCES clips (clip_id),
-- Constraints taken from the Aurantium spec. CONSTRAINT key_assignments_check_order_value CHECK (ka_value_start <= ka_value_center AND ka_value_center <= ka_value_end AND ka_value_end <= 294967295),
CONSTRAINT key_assignments_check_amplitude_at_velocity_start_normalized CHECK (0 <= ka_amplitude_at_velocity_start AND ka_amplitude_at_velocity_start <= 1), CONSTRAINT key_assignments_check_amplitude_at_velocity_center_normalized CHECK (0 <= ka_amplitude_at_velocity_center AND ka_amplitude_at_velocity_center <= 1), CONSTRAINT key_assignments_check_amplitude_at_velocity_end_normalized CHECK (0 <= ka_amplitude_at_velocity_end AND ka_amplitude_at_velocity_end <= 1),
CONSTRAINT key_assignments_check_order_at_velocity_start CHECK (ka_at_velocity_start <= ka_at_velocity_center AND ka_at_velocity_center <= ka_at_velocity_end),
CONSTRAINT key_assignments_check_at_velocity_start_normalized CHECK (0 <= ka_at_velocity_start AND ka_at_velocity_start <= 1), CONSTRAINT key_assignments_check_at_velocity_center_normalized CHECK (0 <= ka_at_velocity_center AND ka_at_velocity_center <= 1), CONSTRAINT key_assignments_check_at_velocity_end_normalized CHECK (0 <= ka_at_velocity_end AND ka_at_velocity_end <= 1),
CONSTRAINT key_assignments_check_amplitude_at_key_start_normalized CHECK (0 <= ka_amplitude_at_key_start AND ka_amplitude_at_key_start <= 1), CONSTRAINT key_assignments_check_amplitude_at_key_center_normalized CHECK (0 <= ka_amplitude_at_key_center AND ka_amplitude_at_key_center <= 1), CONSTRAINT key_assignments_check_amplitude_at_key_end_normalized CHECK (0 <= ka_amplitude_at_key_end AND ka_amplitude_at_key_end <= 1)
) STRICT
CREATE TABLE metadata ( metadata_key TEXT NOT NULL, metadata_value TEXT NOT NULL ) STRICT
Schema.Comment: The undo table stores the undo history.
Schema.Statement: CREATE TABLE undo ( undo_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL, undo_description TEXT NOT NULL, undo_time INTEGER NOT NULL, undo_data BLOB NOT NULL ) STRICT
Schema.Comment: The redo table stores the redo history.
Schema.Statement: CREATE TABLE redo ( redo_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL, redo_description TEXT NOT NULL, redo_time INTEGER NOT NULL, redo_data BLOB NOT NULL ) STRICT
